moments.title: England vs Panama in World Cup
moments.blurb: England takes on Panama in their second group stage match of the FIFA World Cup 2026, hosted across North America.

angles.name: Match Build-up
angles.copy: Big game for England coming up! They face Panama next Saturday in the World Cup. What are your predictions for the Three Lions?

angles.name: Team Talk
angles.copy: England's World Cup journey continues! Next up: Panama. How do you think the squad will line up for this crucial group game?

moments.title: Wimbledon 2026 Begins
moments.blurb: The Championships, Wimbledon, the third Grand Slam tennis tournament of the year, is set to kick off its 2026 edition at the All England Club in London.

angles.name: Anticipation
angles.copy: Get ready for strawberries, cream, and world-class tennis! Wimbledon 2026 starts in just 10 days. Who are you backing for the title this year?

angles.name: London Buzz
angles.copy: The buzz is building in London! Wimbledon is almost here, bringing two weeks of incredible tennis to the capital. Who's excited?

moments.title: Taylor Swift claims UK No. 1
moments.blurb: Taylor Swift's 'I Knew It, I Knew You' from the Toy Story 5 soundtrack has hit number one on the Official UK Singles Chart this week.

angles.name: Chart Topper
angles.copy: She's done it again! Taylor Swift is officially #1 on the UK Singles Chart with 'I Knew It, I Knew You'. Big win for the Swifties!

angles.name: Movie Magic
angles.copy: From the Toy Story 5 soundtrack to the top of the charts! Taylor Swift's 'I Knew It, I Knew You' is your new UK #1. Have you heard it?

moments.title: Olivia Rodrigo's new entry
moments.blurb: Olivia Rodrigo makes a massive new entry at number two on the Official UK Singles Chart with her track 'Stupid Song', just behind Taylor Swift.

angles.name: Hot New Track
angles.copy: Straight in at #2! Olivia Rodrigo's 'Stupid Song' is the highest new entry on this week's UK Singles Chart. What do you think of it?

angles.name: Chart Battle
angles.copy: A huge debut for Olivia Rodrigo's 'Stupid Song' at #2! Almost took the top spot this week. Is it your favourite new tune?

moments.title: House of the Dragon S3 Premiere
moments.blurb: The highly anticipated third season of HBO's Game of Thrones prequel, House of the Dragon, premieres on Sky Atlantic and HBO Max on Monday, June 22.

angles.name: Fantasy Returns
angles.copy: Dragons return! House of the Dragon Season 3 lands on Monday. Who's ready to dive back into the world of Westeros?

angles.name: Weekend Binge Prep
angles.copy: Clear your Monday night! House of the Dragon Season 3 is almost here. What are your predictions for the Targaryen civil war?

moments.title: The Bear Season 5 Launch
moments.blurb: The fifth season of the critically acclaimed series 'The Bear' premieres on Disney+ on Friday, June 26, continuing the intense culinary drama.

angles.name: Kitchen Chaos
angles.copy: Chef! The Bear Season 5 is serving up new episodes next Friday on Disney+. Who else is hooked on this kitchen chaos?

angles.name: Bingeworthy
angles.copy: Get ready for a new helping of The Bear! Season 5 drops next week. Are you ready for more high-stakes drama from The Original Beef?

moments.title: Clarkson's Farm Season 5 Concludes
moments.blurb: The final episodes (7-8) of Clarkson's Farm Season 5 were released on Prime Video on June 17, wrapping up another eventful season at Diddly Squat.

angles.name: Farm Finale
angles.copy: Did you catch the final episodes of Clarkson's Farm Season 5? What did you think of the latest from Diddly Squat?

angles.name: Rural Drama
angles.copy: It's all over for another season! Clarkson's Farm Season 5 wrapped up this week. Jeremy and Kaleb certainly had their hands full again!

moments.title: I Kissed a Girl Series 2 Airing
moments.blurb: The second and final series of the BBC's LGBTQ+ dating show 'I Kissed a Girl' is currently airing in June, following the success of its male counterpart.

angles.name: Dating Show Buzz
angles.copy: Are you watching 'I Kissed a Girl' on the BBC this month? The second series is currently airing and bringing all the drama!

angles.name: Representation
angles.copy: It's the final series of 'I Kissed a Girl' this month. Great to see LGBTQ+ representation on mainstream TV. What are your thoughts on the show?

moments.title: Ann Wilson of Heart turns 76
moments.blurb: Ann Wilson, the powerful lead vocalist of the legendary rock band Heart, celebrates her 76th birthday today.

angles.name: Rock Legend
angles.copy: Happy 76th Birthday to the iconic voice of Heart, Ann Wilson! What's your favourite Heart power ballad?

angles.name: Music Icon
angles.copy: Sending birthday wishes to rock legend Ann Wilson! Her incredible vocals have given us so many classics. Which Heart song is on repeat for you today?

moments.title: Paula Abdul turns 64
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning singer, dancer, and choreographer Paula Abdul celebrates her 64th birthday today.

angles.name: Pop Queen
angles.copy: Forever Our Girl! Happy 64th Birthday to the one and only Paula Abdul. What's your go-to track for a dose of pop perfection?

angles.name: Dance Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 64th Birthday to pop icon and choreography queen, Paula Abdul! Which of her hits gets you dancing?

moments.title: Macklemore turns 43
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning rapper and activist Macklemore, known for hits like 'Thrift Shop' and 'Can't Hold Us', celebrates his 43rd birthday today.

angles.name: Hip-Hop Star
angles.copy: Happy 43rd Birthday to Macklemore! From chart-toppers to powerful anthems, what's your favourite track from him?

angles.name: Rap Hits
angles.copy: Birthday shout-out to Macklemore, turning 43 today! Still got that 'Thrift Shop' energy. What's his best track?

moments.title: Gabrielle turns 57
moments.blurb: British singer-songwriter Gabrielle, known for UK No. 1 hits 'Dreams' and 'Rise', celebrates her 57th birthday today.

angles.name: UK Soul Queen
angles.copy: Happy 57th Birthday to our very own Gabrielle! Still got 'Dreams' on repeat. What's your favourite hit from her?

angles.name: Timeless Voice
angles.copy: Wishing a wonderful 57th Birthday to the incredible Gabrielle! Her voice is truly timeless. What's your top track from the UK icon?

moments.title: Lionel Richie turns 77
moments.blurb: Music legend Lionel Richie, known for his iconic solo career and work with The Commodores, celebrates his 77th birthday tomorrow.

source.l: Off The Wall School Of Music

angles.name: Soulful Superstar
angles.copy: Hello! Is it Lionel Richie's 77th birthday you're looking for? Yep, it's tomorrow! What's your all-time favourite Lionel track?

angles.name: Music Icon
angles.copy: Celebrating the incredible Lionel Richie for his 77th birthday tomorrow! So many hits, so many memories. What's the one song that always makes you think of him?

moments.title: Lana Del Rey turns 41
moments.blurb: American singer-songwriter Lana Del Rey, known for her melancholic and cinematic pop, celebrates her 41st birthday on Sunday.

angles.name: Alt-Pop Queen
angles.copy: Happy 41st Birthday to the captivating Lana Del Rey this Sunday! Which of her tracks transports you to another world?

angles.name: Iconic Voice
angles.copy: Birthday wishes for Lana Del Rey, turning 41 on Sunday! Her unique sound has defined a generation. What's your favourite Lana song?

moments.title: Cyndi Lauper turns 73
moments.blurb: The flamboyant pop icon Cyndi Lauper, known for 'Girls Just Want to Have Fun' and her distinctive style, celebrates her 73rd birthday on Monday.

angles.name: 80s Pop Icon
angles.copy: Girls Just Want to Have Fun! And a Happy 73rd Birthday to Cyndi Lauper on Monday! What's your favourite colourful hit from her?

angles.name: Timeless Style
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 73rd Birthday to the incredible Cyndi Lauper on Monday! Her music and style are truly iconic. Which of her songs is a classic for you?

moments.title: Summer Solstice Approaches
moments.blurb: The Summer Solstice, marking the longest day and shortest night of the year in the Northern Hemisphere, occurs on Sunday, June 21, 2026, at 9:24 AM BST.

angles.name: Longest Day
angles.copy: The longest day of the year is almost here! Summer Solstice is this Sunday. How are you planning to make the most of the extra daylight?

angles.name: Midsummer Magic
angles.copy: Midsummer is upon us! This Sunday marks the Summer Solstice. It's a moment of light, growth, and renewal. What does it mean to you?
